---
name: Feature Request
about: Suggest a new feature or improvement
title: "[Feature] "
labels: ["enhancement", "triage"]
---

## Problem / Use Case

What problem does this solve? Who has it? Avoid jumping straight to a solution.

## Proposed Solution

A description of what you would like to see. UI sketches and example flows are welcome.

## Alternatives Considered

Other approaches you thought about and why you ruled them out.

## Scope

- **App area:** [calendar / meetings / discord-bot / docs / API / other]
- **Audience:** [calendar facilitators / participants / self-hosters / contributors / other]

## Additional Context

Links to related issues, discussions, or external references.

> Larger ideas are welcome -- consider opening a Discussion first if the design is open-ended.
